name: Andrew Mackenzie
title: Founder & Chief Investment Officer
bio: Visionary founder of Zenith Asset Management with 31 years in alternative asset management. Built Zenith into $290B multi-strategy platform focused on absolute return generation.

name: Patricia Morrison
title: Head of Equity Strategies
bio: Leads $95B equity portfolio across long/short and market-neutral strategies. 26 years equity market experience with expertise in both quantitative and fundamental approaches.

name: Vladimir Petrov
title: Chief Economist & Strategist
bio: Provides macroeconomic forecasting driving portfolio positioning. PhD Economics from Oxford with 23 years institutional research experience and publications in leading journals.

name: Lisa Chen
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Credit Opportunities
bio: Manages $68B credit investment strategy identifying distressed and special situation opportunities. 20 years credit expertise with exceptional track record in high-yield recovery positions.

name: Henrik Svensson
title: Head of Quantitative Research
bio: Leads team developing proprietary quantitative models for trading and portfolio construction. 18 years quantitative research with PhDs in Mathematics and Physics on team.

name: Monica Bergstrom
title: Portfolio Manager - Derivative Strategies
bio: Manages $52B in sophisticated derivatives and volatility strategies. 19 years derivatives markets expertise with focus on relative value and volatility trading opportunities.

name: Rajesh Kapoor
title: Equity Analyst - India & Emerging Asia
bio: Senior analyst with deep expertise in Indian and Southeast Asian markets. 14 years emerging markets investing with strong on-ground networks and proprietary intelligence gathering.

name: Francoise Moreau
title: Trader - Multi-Asset
bio: Executes $290B in trading operations across equities, fixed income, and derivatives. 17 years trading expertise with focus on liquidity provision and execution optimization.

name: Geoffrey Walsh
title: Fixed Income Analyst - Corporate Credit
bio: Leads corporate credit research team analyzing 800+ investment-grade and high-yield issuers. 16 years credit analysis with exceptional ability to forecast credit events.

name: Yuki Nakamoto
title: Risk Manager
bio: Manages comprehensive risk framework for $290B portfolio including stress testing and scenario analysis. 15 years risk management with expertise in risk factor decomposition and attribution.
